zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas de Ros於大約1406年出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾貝爾沃易 卡素時，他的父親Sir William de Ros, Knt.38歲，母親Margaret FitzAlan37歲。他和Eleanor Beauchamp至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1430年8月18日在法國i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲享年25歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas de Ros于大约1406年出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾貝爾沃易 卡素时，他的父亲Sir William de Ros, Knt.38岁，母亲Margaret FitzAlan37岁。他和Eleanor Beauchamp至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1430年8月18日在法国i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲享年25岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ros
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Enrique, Luis, Jose, Alberto, Eduardo, Rafael, Elena, Fidel, Joaquin, Manuel, Pablo, Ramon.  Southeast Asian Leang, Phon, Lap, Phan, Pho, Saroeun, Sophal, Sophan, Sophea, Tha, Thang, Yen.
Catalan: nickname for someone with blond hair or a fair complexion, ultimately from Latin russus.

variants.name: Rus
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Romanian Simion, Grigore, Doina, Dorel, Ilie, Liviu, Petru, Vasile.

Czech, Slovak, and Romanian (of Slavic origin): ethnic name for a Russian, ultimately derived from an Old Norse term meaning ‘oarsman, rower’ (from the root roths-), a reference to the fact that the Russian state was established by Scandinavians who rowed their ships up rivers inland from the Baltic sea. In some cases this may also be origin of the Slovenian and Croatian surname (see 3 below).
Czech: descriptive nickname from the adjective rusý ‘blond’.

variants.name: Ross
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from one or other of a number of Scottish and English places called Ross or Roos(e), especially Roose (Lancashire) and Roos (East Yorkshire). The placenames derive from a British ancestor of Welsh rhos ‘moor, heath, plain’, which is the sense of the cognate Gaelic word ros. The Scottish surname has at least three origins. First, the Anglo-Norman family from Roos (East Yorkshire) was introduced to Scotland when Robert of Roos, lord of Wark Castle (Northumberland), married Isabella, an illegitimate daughter of King William the Lion. Second, various families took the name from the province of Ross in northern Scotland and other places of that name. Third, there were Norman families in Scotland by the 13th century who probably derived their name from Rots in Normandy (see 2 below). The descendants of Godfrey de Ros, tenant of the de Morville lords of Cunninghame, were major landholders in Ayrshire, and almost certainly took their name from Rots. The Rose family of Kilravock (Nairnshire) may take their name from either of these three (see Rose ). The lairds of Balnagown adopted the surname Ross after the earldom of Ross (to which they considered themselves rightful heirs) had passed into other hands through the female line.

English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Rots in Calvados (France), probably named with the ancient Germanic element rod ‘clearing’ (compare Rhodes ). This was the original home of a family de Ros, who were established in Kent in 1130 and had major estates in Kent until well into the 13th century.

English: habitational name from Wrose, in Shipley, near Bradford (Yorkshire), with re-spelling of Wr- as R- due to the loss of /w/ before /r/ in early modern English pronunciation. The spelling Wrose is no longer current. The placename derives from Old English wrāse ‘knot, something twisted’, referring to the steep-sided hill on which the settlement stands, with the sense ‘broken or twisting hill’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas de Ros was born about 1406, in Belvoir Castle, Leicestershire, England, his father, Sir William de Ros, Knt., was 38 and his mother, Margaret FitzAlan, was 37. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Eleanor Beauchamp. He died on 18 August 1430, in Paris, Île-de-France, France, at the age of 25.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas de Ros est né environ 1406, à Belvoir Castle, Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, Sir William de Ros, Knt., avait 38 ans et sa mère, Margaret FitzAlan, avait 37 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Eleanor Beauchamp. Il est décédé le 18 août 1430, à Paris, Île-de-France, France, à l’âge de 25 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas de Ros um 1406 in Belvoir Castle, Leicestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William de Ros, Knt. 38 und seine Mutter Margaret FitzAlan 37. Er hatte mit Eleanor Beauchamp mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 18. August 1430 im Alter von 25 Jahren in Paris, Île-de-France, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas de Ros è nato il circa 1406 nel Belvoir Castle, Leicestershire, England, il suo padre, Sir William de Ros, Knt., aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Margaret FitzAlan, aveva 37 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Eleanor Beauchamp. Morì il 18 agosto 1430, nel Paris, Île-de-France, Francia, all'età di 25 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas de Rosが約1406年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアベルボイル カストルで生まれた時，父Sir William de Ros, Knt.は38歳，母Margaret FitzAlanは37歳であった。彼はEleanor Beauchampとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1430年8月18日にフランスiレ-デ-フランスパーイスで25歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas de Ros(이)가 대략 1406년 영국 레이스스터실르 벨보이르 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William de Ros, Knt.(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret FitzAlan(은)는 37세였다. 그는 Eleanor Beauchamp(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1430년 8월 18일 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 파리스에서 25세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas de Ros nasceu aproximadamente 1406, em Belvoir Castle, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William de Ros, Knt., tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Margaret FitzAlan, tinha 37 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Eleanor Beauchamp. Ele faleceu em 18 de agosto de 1430, em Paris, Île-de-France, França, com 25 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas de Ros родился около 1406 г. в местности белвоир кастл, лисестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William de Ros, Knt. было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret FitzAlan, 37. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Eleanor Beauchamp. Он умер 18 августа 1430 г. в местности пэрис, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 25 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas de Ros nació aproximadamente 1406, en Belvoir Castle, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William de Ros, Knt., tenía 38 años y su mamá, Margaret FitzAlan, tenía 37 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Eleanor Beauchamp. Murió el 18 de agosto de 1430, en Paris, Île-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 25 años.
